mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.perms FROM sys_user_role ur LEFT JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON ur.role_id = rm.role_id LEFT JOIN sys_menu m ON rm.menu_id = m.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.perms IS NOT NULL AND m.perms != ''
SELECT DISTINCT m.id FROM sys_user_role ur LEFT JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON ur.role_id = rm.role_id LEFT JOIN sys_menu m ON rm.menu_id = m.id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.id IS NOT NULL

SELECT u.*, d.dept_name, p.position_name FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_dept d ON u.dept_id = d.id LEFT JOIN sys_position p ON u.position_id = p.id WHERE u.del_flag = 0 AND (u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.real_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR d.dept_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR p.position_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%')) ORDER BY u.create_time DESC
